name: GNews

search.description: Search articles by keyword with advanced filtering options.

top_headlines.description: Fetch trending headlines across 9 categories based on Google News rankings.

notes: Aggregated news API. Free plan is for non-commercial, development and testing purposes only. Articles have a 12-hour delay on the free tier. Full article content is returned (unlike NewsAPI).

search.q: Keyword or phrase to search for. Supports AND, OR, NOT, and "exact phrase".
search.lang: 2-letter language code. e.g. en | fr | de | ar | zh
search.country: 2-letter country code. e.g. us | gb | in
search.max: Number of articles to return. Default 10, max 10 on free tier.
search.in: Restrict search to: title | description | content
search.nullable: Fields that can be null: image | description | content
search.from: Oldest article date in ISO 8601. e.g. 2026-02-01T00:00:00Z
search.to: Newest article date in ISO 8601. e.g. 2026-02-28T23:59:59Z
search.expand: Set to content to retrieve full article content (paid plans only).

top_headlines.topic: general | world | nation | business | technology | entertainment | sports | science | health
top_headlines.lang: 2-letter language code. e.g. en | fr | de
top_headlines.country: 2-letter country code. e.g. us | gb | in
top_headlines.max: Number of articles to return. Default 10, max 10 on free tier.
top_headlines.nullable: Fields that can be null: image | description | content

articles.title: Example Title
articles.content: Full article content (truncated to first 5 sentences on free tier)...

name: NewsAPI

everything.description: Search through millions of articles from 150,000+ sources. Best for article discovery.

top_headlines.description: Live breaking headlines by country, category, or source.

sources.description: Returns available news sources to use in other endpoints.

notes: Aggregated news API. Free plan is strictly for local development and testing — cannot be used in staging or production. Full article body is not returned; only a truncated content snippet.

everything.q: Keywords or phrase to search for. Supports AND, OR, NOT, +, - and "exact phrase". Max 500 chars.
everything.searchIn: Restrict search to: title | description | content
everything.domains: Comma-separated domains to restrict results. e.g. bbc.co.uk,techcrunch.com
everything.language: 2-letter language code. e.g. en | de | fr | ar | zh
everything.pageSize: Number of results per page. Default 20, max 100.

top_headlines.country: 2-letter country code. e.g. us | gb | in. Cannot be mixed with sources.
top_headlines.category: business | entertainment | general | health | science | sports | technology. Cannot be mixed with sources.
top_headlines.sources: Comma-separated source IDs. Cannot be mixed with country or category.

articles.author: Example Author
articles.title: Example headline
articles.content: Truncated article content (max ~200 chars on free plan)...

name: seeking-alpha

news_list.description: List news articles by category (market news, earnings, crypto, etc.). Primary endpoint for news feed.

news_get_details.description: Get full details of a single news item by its ID.

articles_list.description: List analysis articles by category (latest, trending, editors picks, etc.).

articles_get_details.description: Get full content and details of a single analysis article by ID.

symbols_get_summary.description: Get summary data for a ticker symbol (price, ratings, market cap, etc.).

symbols_get_news.description: Get news articles related to a specific ticker symbol.

symbols_get_analysis.description: Get analyst articles related to a specific ticker symbol.

market_get_movers.description: Get top market movers (gainers/losers) for the day.

market_get_trending.description: Get trending tickers and topics on Seeking Alpha.

cost: Freemium via RapidAPI — Free tier available / Paid plans for higher usage

free_tier_limits.overage_fee: $0.01 per additional request beyond free quota
free_tier_limits.note: RapidAPI freemium plans require a credit card on file to handle potential overages.

notes: Financial news and analysis API sourced from Seeking Alpha — covers market news, earnings, stock analysis, and ticker data. Finance-focused (not general news). Responses use a JSON:API-style structure with data in 'attributes' and relationships in 'relationships' objects. Free tier provides 500 requests/month via RapidAPI.

news_list.size: Number of items to return per page. Default 20, max 40.
news_list.category: News category filter. Options: market-news::all | market-news::top-news | market-news::on-the-move | market-news::market-pulse | market-news::notable-calls | market-news::buybacks | market-news::commodities | market-news::crypto | market-news::issuance | market-news::global | market-news::dividend-ideas | market-news::earnings | market-news::spacs
news_list.since: Unix timestamp — return articles published after this date.
news_list.until: Unix timestamp — return articles published before this date.

articles_list.category: Article category. Options: latest-articles | editors-picks | stock-ideas | dividends | etfs | macro-economy | earnings | technology | energy | financial-services | healthcare
articles_list.size: Number of results per page. Default 20.

page.title: Market News
page.description: Latest market news from Seeking Alpha
